release_key.uid: SOST Release (V13 RC1 release signing key) <sost@sostcore.com>

_note: PUBLIC SAFE MIRROR of the operator-local v13-rc1 artifact bundle MANIFEST.json. The repo_root_basename, no_copy_binaries_mode and preflight_was_ready fields from the internal manifest are intentionally OMITTED here (they were either operator-host details or internal flags). The binaries themselves are NOT committed to this repository and have NOT yet been uploaded to any public distribution surface (binaries_uploaded=false). The SHA256SUMS file is published at /api/v13_rc1_SHA256SUMS.txt and has now been SIGNED with the SOST release key (primary fingerprint 41B1A46E626064AB524CB99EB6B9E2852AE41A04, signing subkey E2FCC898520842F0192EF7A46422CC120F51DCEA); the ASCII-armored detached signature is published at /api/v13_rc1_SHA256SUMS.asc. release_status is therefore signed_metadata_only — anyone downloading future V13 RC1 binaries from the operator's eventual release surface can verify them locally with sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS && gpg --verify SHA256SUMS.asc SHA256SUMS against the SOST release public key. Binary upload itself remains an explicit manual operator action and release_status will move to signed_and_published only once the operator has uploaded the binaries to a public distribution channel. NOTHING in this website edit signs anything, uploads any binary, opens the network, calls the GitHub API, touches a wallet or private key, or broadcasts a transaction.
